overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting nighttime exploration of a dystopian shantytown built beneath a massive Petrochem industrial structure. The player character traverses from a rooftop vantage point down into the streets, navigating through makeshift buildings and debris toward the illuminated facility entrance.

events.description: begins panning left to survey the shantytown below

agents.ego_description: standing on a rooftop ledge, slowly panning left to survey the sprawling shantytown and Petrochem structure below

entered.detail: cluster of makeshift structures and containers forming a dense settlement
massive curved concrete wall with illuminated Petrochem corporate logo
tall yellow construction crane towering over the settlement
glowing skyscrapers visible on the horizon beyond the shantytown
flat concrete rooftop surface with visible seams and weathering

segments.scene_description: The clip opens on a rooftop overlook at night, revealing a sprawling dystopian shantytown built beneath a massive Petrochem industrial structure. The camera slowly pans left across the scene, showcasing the dense cluster of makeshift buildings, a distant construction crane, and the curved stadium wall with corporate branding, all illuminated by artificial lighting against the dark sky.

events.description: begins walking forward along the rooftop edge from stationary observation
descends from rooftop level to street level via a ramp or drop

agents.ego_description: walking along the rooftop edge before descending to a lower level, maintaining view of the shantytown below

entered.detail: low concrete wall with red and white striped safety markings
industrial ventilation units and mechanical structures on the rooftop

segments.scene_description: The character moves from observation to action, walking along the rooftop edge with concrete barriers visible on the right. The camera passes industrial equipment as it traverses the rooftop, then descends to a lower level around the 18-second mark, bringing the shantytown buildings into closer view while losing sight of the distant skyline.

events.description: passing a burning car on the right, casting flickering orange light

agents.ego_description: walking along the street level through the shantytown, passing makeshift structures and debris

notable_agents.action: standing near the burning car on the sidewalk

entered.detail: small structure with glowing red interior lighting and industrial details
wrecked vehicle engulfed in flames emitting smoke and orange light
heaps of garbage bags and debris accumulated along the street edge
red and white striped concrete blocks blocking vehicle access

segments.scene_description: Now at street level, the character walks through the shantytown's narrow streets, passing a building with ominous red lighting on the left. Around 28 seconds, a burning car comes into view on the right, casting flickering light across the scene. The Petrochem stadium wall looms larger in the center of the frame as the character progresses through the debris-filled environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: main approach to Petrochem facility entrance

events.description: turning toward the Petrochem facility entrance ahead
crossing the street toward the main entrance checkpoint

agents.ego_description: walking down the main street toward the Petrochem facility entrance, navigating around barriers

notable_agents.action: walking toward the facility entrance ahead of the player character

entered.detail: large illuminated doorway at the base of the stadium structure with security lighting
glowing green and yellow advertisement signs on building facades
guard post with barriers and lighting near the entrance

segments.scene_description: The character turns toward the massive Petrochem facility entrance, which now dominates the center of the frame. The street opens into a main approach with neon signage visible on the right and security checkpoints appearing near the entrance. The shantytown buildings recede into the left background as the character crosses the street toward the facility doors.

scene_state.functional_zone: Petrochem facility entrance under stadium overhang

events.description: entering the sheltered area directly beneath the stadium overhang

agents.ego_description: approaching the Petrochem facility entrance, moving under the stadium structure toward the doors

notable_agents.action: standing guard near the entrance checkpoint

entered.detail: large metal entrance doors with bright interior lighting visible through the opening
massive concrete ceiling of the stadium structure creating a sheltered canopy
bright floodlights illuminating the entrance area from above

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character entering the sheltered zone beneath the Petrochem stadium, where the sky is completely obscured by the massive overhang. The entrance doors glow with bright light ahead, while security barriers and a guard are visible on the left. The environment shifts from open street to enclosed facility approach as the character reaches the destination.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person descent from a high rooftop overlook into the claustrophobic streets of a dystopian shantytown, ending at the imposing entrance of a corporate facility. It begins with a slow pan across a sprawling cluster of makeshift buildings and a distant construction crane beneath a massive Petrochem structure. As the camera moves along the rooftop edge and descends to a lower level, the distant skyline vanishes, replaced by the narrow, debris-filled streets of the settlement. The scene then shifts through an environment of ominous red lighting and the flickering glow of a burning car before the massive stadium wall looms larger in the frame. Finally, the camera turns toward the facility entrance as the open street gives way to a sheltered zone beneath a heavy industrial overhang, moving past security barriers toward glowing doors.
